nasb.text: The husband must fulfill his duty to his wife, and likewise also the wife to her husband.

esv.text: The husband should give to his wife her conjugal rights, and likewise the wife to her husband.

cnv.text: 丈夫對妻子應該盡他的本分，妻子對丈夫也應當這樣。

ccb.text: 夫妻双方都应当履行自己的义务，过正常的夫妻生活。

csbs.text: 丈夫对妻子应当尽自己的本分，妻子对丈夫也应当如此。
